description: A service consuming abnormally high memory, CPU, disk, or network resources, or a resource limit being reached/exceeded.

symptom_type.description: Fixed value identifying the symptom category

service.description: The service or component exhibiting excessive resource usage

event.description: Brief description of the resource overuse event

resource_type.description: Type of resource involved (memory, CPU, disk, network, threads, etc.)

usage_value.description: The excessive usage amount or threshold mentioned in the log (e.g. '95% memory', '8GB')

regex.description: Python regex pattern matching the log line that shows the resource overuse

line.description: Line number in the log file

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the event extracted from the log line
